name: Lumen Drift
tagline: An original Game Boy Advance game — finished, publish-safe, 100% original assets.
description: A finished homebrew GBA ROM (v1.3) built entirely from original assets. Download the ROM and load it into any GBA emulator to play.
status_note: Downloadable now — the lumen-drift-v1.3 GitHub Release is published; the Download button fetches the ROM (lumen-drift.gba) directly from that release.

name: mineverse
tagline: A staged web mining-world game — the fleet's games flagship.
description: A staged web game with stages 0, a, b and c complete. It now serves live as a read-only view over the superbot mining economy; player sign-in is launching next.

name: games-web
tagline: A zero-dependency web app: an RPG mining character sheet in the browser.
description: A zero-dependency web app showing an RPG mining character sheet, deployed live to GitHub Pages. Open it in the browser and switch between sample characters.
status_note: Live on GitHub Pages — a phase-1 character sheet rendered over mock data.
